query:
UPDATE products SET imageUrl = CASE 
  WHEN id = 120001 THEN 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663346956907/kDHKMkQxvxGGSdVdvmorSF/lightweight-tshirt-h7WEUyxvFDArzAHvBPcWuf.webp'

END
WHERE id IN (120001, 120002, 120003, 120004)
